theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

narrative.summary: Talen Energy: 정량 종합 68점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 58 / 중기 68 / 장기 74. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 정상
overheat.guidance: 진입 OK. 종합 점수가 좋다면 매수 검토.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 4.7% → 2-ATR 손절폭 9.4%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 3개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA, 일봉 200MA, Anchored VWAP (고점 기준). 현재가 대비 +4.4% 위치. T1 $393 (R:R 0.8)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $369.1 아래 손절가 $340.1 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Oil Holds Decline as Traders Seek Clarity on Hormuz Reopening
top_news.summary: Oil held its biggest drop in more than two weeks as traders, shippers and producers awaited details of a US-Iran deal that’s intended to pave the way for the full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

top_news.title: Bolivia Tells Investors FX Unification, IMF Deal Coming Soon
top_news.summary: Bolivia told investors it is close to agreeing on a financing program with the International Monetary Fund, likely after introducing a floating exchange rate to end a dollar peg that has been in place for more than 15 years.

top_news.title: Waste Management of Canada Sells C$700 Million of Bonds
top_news.summary: Waste Management of Canada sold C$700 million ($500 million) of notes on Monday, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

top_news.title: Montreal’s REM Raises C$1.85 Billion in Four-Part Bond Sale
top_news.summary: The Réseau express métropolitain (REM), a light rail system in Greater Montreal, raised C$1.85 billion ($1.32 billion) in a bond sale, according to people with knowledge of the deal.

top_news.title: MSG Should Split Into Two Companies, Ariel's John Rogers Says
top_news.summary: John Rogers, Ariel Investments founder, chair, CIO and co-CEO,  says MSG stocks have not reflected the value of the Knicks or the Rangers during an interview with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Elanco CEO: Screwworm Easier To Manage Than Contain
top_news.summary:
Jeff Simmons, Elanco Animal Health President & CEO, discusses the emerging threat of screwworm infections spreading beyond the initial control zone in Texas, with at least 12 confirmed cases including eight heads of cattle. Simmons reassured viewers that while the pest is expected to spread, it can be managed effectively through current interventions such as the release of sterile flies to reduce the screwworm population. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close."



 (Sourc

top_news.title: Blackstone’s Ancestry Hires Bank of America for $2 Billion Loan
top_news.summary: Ancestry.com Inc. is weighing a $2.25 billion loan deal to refinance some of its existing debt with the help of Bank of America Corp., according to people with knowledge of the matter.

top_news.title: West Texas Gas Rises Above Zero for First Time in Four Months
top_news.summary: Drillers in the world’s largest shale field on Monday were paid for the natural gas they produced for the first time in more than four months.

top_news.title: Nvidia Joins AI Borrowing Frenzy With $25 Billion Bond Sale
top_news.summary: Chipmaking giant Nvidia Corp. sold $25 billion of high-grade bonds, joining a wave of jumbo debt offerings from tech heavyweights as investors clamor to get exposure to the artificial intelligence boom.

top_news.title: Canada’s BCE Cuts 1% of Jobs as It Focuses on AI, Network Build
top_news.summary: Canadian telecommunications company BCE Inc. is cutting hundreds of jobs, reducing costs as it plans major investments in its US internet and artificial intelligence businesses.
